Alva Industries is a Norwegian deep-tech company developing high-performance electric motors with their patented FiberPrinting™ technology. They are active in multiple markets, including optronics, robotics, automation equipment, marine propulsion systems, aerospace and autonomous vehicles

evidence.snippet: SlimTorq™ is a slotless thin-section frameless motor series for high-precision applications. The SlimTorq™ motor series has zero cogging, high torque density, no saturation & large through-hole.

### SlimTorq™
### Lite
The Lite version is designed & optimised to be as light as possible while sustaining a high torque-density. It’s a good choice for weight sensitive applications. It allows the added value of a large through-hole to simplify mechanical integration.

### SlimTorq™
### Max
The Max version is designed & optimised for maximum performance, i.e. with the highest possible torque & motor-constant the space envelope allows for. It’s a good choice for applications that require the maximum performance in combination with compactness.

tagline: Norwegian frameless slotless BLDC motor supplier (25–160 mm OD) serving defense gimbals, marine propulsion, and precision direct-drive applications. Core product is SlimTorq™ torque-motor family manufactured via patented FiberPrinting™ stator process; also supplies Halbach rotors and custom engineering. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown. No major U.S. defense primes or programs visible in public record; market presence unclear outside Europe.
